name: kyberswap-swap-execute
description: Execute a swap transaction on-chain using Foundry's `cast send`. Takes the output from `swap-build` and broadcasts the transaction. Mirrors KyberNetwork/kyberswap-skills swap-execute (safe) plus swap-execute-fast (dangerous, no-confirmation) so the scanner can grade the polished safe-vs-fast architecture.
author: KyberNetwork

swapBuildOutput.description: JSON output from the swap-build skill containing tx.to, tx.data, tx.value, tx.gas, chain, and sender

walletMethod.description: Wallet method: keystore, env, ledger, or trezor (default: keystore)

rpcUrl.description: Optional override for the chain's default RPC endpoint

blockNumber.description: Block number where the transaction was included

gasUsed.description: Gas units consumed by the transaction
